productName: Micro Bar - 1g Disposable - Micro Bar - Cherry Limeade Slush - 1g
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with Cherry Limeade Slush oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Zero setup, all flavor — a tart, crisp lime flavor, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
